description: Volume clone: volume_id-required and label-required rejections both languages agree on (confirm set so both reach them), plus the clone POST. Confirm-gate text and negative-id handling diverge (see report).

cases.name: rejects a negative volume_id
cases.expect_error: volume_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This operation creates a billable cloned volume. Set confirm=true to proceed.
